title: Zorbit Module Manifest v2
description: Complete module manifest schema. Every Zorbit module (platform service or business app) registers itself with the platform by providing this manifest. This is the contract between a module and the Zorbit platform.

moduleId.description: Unique identifier for the module, using underscore word separator. Examples: identity, authorization, pfs_datatable, app_hi_quotation.

moduleName.description: Human-readable display name for the module.

moduleType.description: Module type matching the repository type prefix: cor=core platform, pfs=platform feature service, app=business application, tpm=third-party module, sdk=SDK library.

description.description: Brief description of what this module does.

owner.description: Team or organization that owns this module.

icon.description: Lucide or Material Design icon name for the module.

color.description: Brand color for the module in hex format.

navigation.description: Menu sections and items this module contributes to the navigation sidebar.

frontend.description: Frontend bundle and routing configuration for micro-frontend loading.

bundleUrl.description: Full URL to the module frontend bundle. Must be a complete URL, not a relative path.

loadStrategy.description: When to load the frontend bundle. eager=on app start, lazy=on first route match, on-demand=explicit user action.

entryComponent.description: Name of the root React/Angular component exported by the bundle.

routes.description: Frontend route patterns this module handles (supports wildcards).

backend.description: Backend service configuration and endpoint declarations.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the backend service (e.g. http://localhost:3113).

apiPrefix.description: Common API prefix for all endpoints (e.g. /api/v1/O/{orgId}/hi-quotation).

reporting.description: Reporting data sources this module exposes for ad-hoc queries and scheduling.

schedulable.description: Whether reports from this module can be scheduled for periodic generation.

seeding.description: Seed data configuration for the seeding service.

profiles.description: Named seed profiles with descriptions and record counts.

dependencies.description: Modules that must be seeded before this one.

events.description: Kafka events this module publishes and subscribes to.

type.description: Database engine used by this module.

collections.description: Collection/table names managed by this module.

dependencies.description: Module dependencies for startup ordering, health checks, and circuit breakers.

platform.description: Platform services this module depends on.

business.description: Business application modules this module depends on.

pii.description: PII handling configuration for the PII vault integration.

autoDetect.description: Whether the SDK interceptor should auto-detect PII in write operations.

declaredFields.description: Explicitly declared PII fields for proactive tokenization.

grafanaDashboard.description: Grafana dashboard slug for this module.

placement.description: Where this module sits in the platform hierarchy: Edition > Business Line > Capability Area

edition.description: Platform edition this module belongs to. Examples: insurer, distributor, tpa, reinsurer, regulator, uhc, platform

businessLine.description: Business line within the edition. Examples: distribution, servicing, finance, platform-core, platform-feature-services

capabilityArea.description: Capability area within the business line. Examples: product-management, policy-admin, claims, ai-automation

sortOrder.description: Sort order within the capability area. Lower = appears first.

registration.description: Kafka-based self-registration configuration. The module publishes this on startup.

kafkaTopic.description: Kafka topic to publish announcements to.

manifestUrl.description: Public URL where the registry can fetch the full manifest. Must be a complete URL.

label.description: Display label for the menu section.

icon.description: Material Design or Lucide icon name.

sortOrder.description: Sort order for the section. Lower numbers appear first.

privilege.description: Privilege code required to see this section.

label.description: Display label for the menu item.

feRoute.description: Frontend route. Must start with /m/ — no org scope allowed in FE routes.

beRoute.description: Backend API route. Supports Handlebars templates: {{org_id}}.

privilege.description: Privilege code required to see this item.

icon.description: Icon for this specific menu item.

visibleInMenu.description: Whether this item appears in the navigation menu.

privilege.description: Privilege code required to access this endpoint.

tier.description: Display priority. Tier 1 = always visible, Tier 2 = shown if space, Tier 3 = collapsed.

chartType.description: Chart subtype (bar, line, donut, pie, area) when type=chart.

dataEndpoint.description: API endpoint that provides widget data.

refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh the widget data.

privilege.description: Privilege required to view this widget.

values.description: Allowed values for enum type fields.

field.description: Field path (dot notation, supports [] for arrays).
